result.stdout:
A CLI tool to manage versioning and dependencies across multiple ecosystems.

Usage:
  versa [command]

Available Commands:
  add         Add a changeset
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  help        Help about any command
  init        Initialize the universion CLI
  pre         Manage pre-release mode
  publish     Publish packages to npm/NuGet and create git tags
  status      Check the status of changesets
  tag         Create git tags for the current versions
  version     Update versions and changelogs

Flags:
      --cwd string   Set the current working directory for the commands
      --debug        Enable debug logging
  -h, --help         help for versa
  -v, --version      version for versa

Use "versa [command] --help" for more information about a command.
